title: Speaking & Listening
objective: Students will explore speaking & listening concepts including Engaging Listeners and Valuing Viewpoints.

steps.content: Welcome to an exciting lesson about Engaging Listeners and Valuing Viewpoints!

Gain, maintain and monitor the interest of listeners when speaking; consider and evaluate different viewpoints, attending to and building on others' contributions; begin to select appropriate language for different situations
Let me show you something cool. Use strategies to engage listeners during a presentation (e.g., make eye contact, vary tone and pace, ask the audience a question)
When you is talking in a group, do they notice if people are losing interest and adjust how they're speaking — or pick up on what others have said and add to it thoughtfully?

You did it! Here's what we explored about Engaging Listeners and Valuing Viewpoints: Use strategies to engage listeners during a presentation (e.g., make eye contact, vary tone and pace, ask the audience a question) Listen to a peer's viewpoint and respond by agreeing, disagreeing, or extending their idea with a reason (e.g., 'I agree with Priya because… but I also think…')
